SEARCH.TITLE: Find PhD opportunities : projects and mentoring offers

INFO.THESE: By exploring the PhD opportunities, PhD projects and mentoring offers available on this platform, you can identify PhD supervisors to collaborate with in developing your own doctoral project. Applications to a doctoral school should only be submitted once the PhD project has been jointly defined.
INFO.SUPERVISION: With a mentoring or partnership offer, researchers indicate that they are interested in supporting PhD candidates on doctoral projects related to specific themes or research questions.
